case_title: CARA E. VAINISH VS. YOLANDA GONZALEZ MACIAS ET AL

docket_entries.description: 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 65712219) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VAINISH, CARA E. AS TO DEFENDANT MACIAS, YOLANDA GONZALEZ DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION RE: POSESSION: SUBJECT RESIDENTIAL LEASE ORT RENTAL AGREEMENT IF HERBY FORFEITED. POSSESSION OF 3007A (AKA "LOWE UNIT") CALIFORNIA STREET, CITY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, STATE OF CALIFORNIA 94115, IS HERBY RESTORED TO PLAINTIFF. EFFECTIVE OCTOBER 15, 2020, DEFENDANT SHALL OCCUPY THE PREMISES THORUGH AND INCLUDING DECEMBER 31, 2020, SOLELY AS A LICENSEE. NO OTHER PERSON SHALL OCCUPY THE PREMISES. EFFECTIVE DECEMBER 31, 2020 AT 5:01 P.M. LIMITED LICENSE SHALL BE REVOKED AND OCCUPANT SHALL SURRENDER POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES TO PLAINTIFF BY SAID TIME. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (NO SASE)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE DISMISSAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1385 SET FOR MAR-16-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. THE DEC-09-2020 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
STIPULATION TO VACATE JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 66426654) FILED BY VAINISH, CARA E. MACIAS, YOLANDA GONZALEZ
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-20-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
FEE PAID ON: JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARA E. VAINISH AND FILED BY DEFENDANT MACIAS, YOLANDA GONZALEZ
